title: Fractal Explorer
description: An escape-time fractal explorer: Mandelbrot, Burning Ship, Tricorn, Multibrot, and Celtic sets, each with an optional Julia mode. Drag to pan, scroll to zoom, double-click to reset — or switch on Auto-zoom for an endless dive that ramps iterations with depth. Flip to Julia and its seed c becomes a live parameter to map to tilt or the music. Animated palette.
